allow: PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\Matteo\\Documents\\Progetti\\ETF-Platform\\etf-temp"; $dst = "C:\\Users\\Matteo\\Documents\\Progetti\\ETF-Platform"; Get-ChildItem $src | ForEach-Object { Move-Item $_.FullName "$dst\\$\($_.Name\)" -Force }; Remove-Item $src -Recurse -Force; Get-ChildItem $dst)

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/etfs.json'\); console.log\('Total:', d.length\); console.log\('With holdings:', d.filter\(e=>e.holdings&&e.holdings.length\).length\); d.forEach\(e=>console.log\(e.ticker, e.assetClass, 'holdings:', e.holdings?.length||0\)\);")
